mapper.select:
select * from cgq_rygl
and qyid in (SELECT id FROM (SELECT t1.*, IF (FIND_IN_SET(pid, @pids) > 0, @pids := CONCAT(@pids, ',', id), 0) AS ischild FROM (SELECT * FROM t_area t ORDER BY pid, id) t1,(SELECT @pids := #{param.qyid}) t2) t3 WHERE (ischild != 0 OR id = #{param.qyid}))
and qyid in (SELECT id FROM (SELECT t1.*, IF (FIND_IN_SET(pid, @pids) > 0, @pids := CONCAT(@pids, ',', id), 0) AS ischild FROM (SELECT * FROM t_area t ORDER BY pid, id) t1,(SELECT @pids := #{param.ssid}) t2) t3 WHERE (ischild != 0 OR id = #{param.ssid}))
and name like concat(concat('%', #{param.name}), '%')
